title: Continue an HTTP transport extraction without widening exports

events.text: Extract HTTP transport from ApiClient without changing public exports or adding dependencies.
I moved request construction into src/http/transport.ts and kept ApiClient as the public facade.
Unit tests pass, but the auth retry test fails because the retry loses the Authorization header.
Copying every header in ApiClient was attempted and reverted because it duplicated transport policy.
Header preservation belongs inside the transport. The streaming response method is still unconverted.
git diff shows src/api-client.ts and src/http/transport.ts modified; src/index.ts is unchanged.

objectiveAndState.text: Extract transport behavior from ApiClient; normal requests moved, auth retry and streaming remain incomplete.

decisionsAndFailedAttempts.text: Copying headers in ApiClient was reverted because transport policy belongs in the transport.

completedAndPending.text: Request construction is extracted; preserve headers on retry, then convert streaming.

workspaceEvidence.text: api-client.ts and the new transport.ts are dirty while index.ts remains unchanged.

nextAction.text: Fix header preservation inside transport and rerun the auth retry test.
